resources.string: Type your note here and click save...
Click on Enter Note to type notes...
No notes found to be saved
No note saved to be cleared

Shukuru Yesu is a thoughtfully designed mobile application created to support daily reflection, organization, and access to spiritual resources. The app provides a simple yet meaningful space where users can write personal notes, track important dates using the calendar, and access songbooks conveniently in one place.
Its goal is to make everyday organization easier while also serving as a helpful companion for moments of inspiration, planning, and spiritual reflection.
Shukuru Yesu was developed by Levi Wani Scopas Robert as part of a personal journey in Android development and the pursuit of building meaningful digital tools that can serve and inspire others.

To access songs, open the Song Books section and choose your preferred song version. Once selected, you can browse through the available songs and read them. The app doesn\'t open the books directly but with the help of external readers.

Use the calendar to organize notes by specific dates. Simply select a date on the calendar — including future dates — and add your notes. When that date arrives, the saved note will still be available for review and editing.

To create a note, open the Notepad section and tap the Enter Note button to begin typing your note. After writing your note, tap Save to store it for later reference. If you want to remove a note, you can use the Clear option. The Preview feature allows you to quickly review your saved note for the selected date.
Shukuru Yesu application respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information.
This application does not collect, store, or share any personal data from users. All notes and information created within the application are stored locally on your device.
Any information entered into the application, such as notes, is used solely for the purpose of providing the app’s features and remains private to the user.
This application does not use third-party services that collect personal information.
Your data remains on your device and is not transmitted to any external servers.
Users are responsible for managing and protecting their own device and the information stored within the application.
By using this application, you agree to this privacy policy.
